generations.code:
import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    sorted_a = sorted(a)
    
    # Check if any duplicates exist
    from collections import Counter
    cnt = Counter(a)
    has_dup = any(v >= 2 for v in cnt.values())
    
    if has_dup:
        print("YES")
        return
    
    # All distinct: compute permutation parity
    # sorted_a[i] should go to position i
    # a[j] = sorted_a[i] means position j maps to position i
    # permutation p where p[j] = i (where sorted_a[i] = a[j])
    
    pos = {v: i for i, v in enumerate(sorted_a)}
    perm = [pos[v] for v in a]
    
    # Compute parity of perm
    visited = [False] * n
    parity = 0
    for i in range(n):
        if not visited[i]:
            cycle_len = 0
            j = i
            while not visited[j]:
                visited[j] = True
                j = perm[j]
                cycle_len += 1
            # cycle of length L contributes L-1 transpositions
            parity ^= (cycle_len - 1) % 2
    
    print("YES" if parity == 0 else "NO")

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()

import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    from collections import Counter
    cnt = Counter(a)
    
    # Check for duplicates
    for v in cnt.values():
        if v > 1:
            print("YES")
            return
    
    # All distinct, compute permutation parity
    # sorted array is just sorted(a)
    # a[i] should go to position where sorted_a has a[i]
    sorted_a = sorted(a)
    pos = {v: i for i, v in enumerate(sorted_a)}
    
    perm = [pos[v] for v in a]
    
    # Count cycles
    visited = [False] * n
    cycles = 0
    for i in range(n):
        if not visited[i]:
            cycles += 1
            j = i
            while not visited[j]:
                visited[j] = True
                j = perm[j]
    
    # Even permutation iff (n - cycles) % 2 == 0
    if (n - cycles) % 2 == 0:
        print("YES")
    else:
        print("NO")

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()

pipelines.final_code:
import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    sorted_a = sorted(a)
    
    # Check if any duplicates exist
    from collections import Counter
    cnt = Counter(a)
    has_dup = any(v >= 2 for v in cnt.values())
    
    if has_dup:
        print("YES")
        return
    
    # All distinct: compute permutation parity
    # sorted_a[i] should go to position i
    # a[j] = sorted_a[i] means position j maps to position i
    # permutation p where p[j] = i (where sorted_a[i] = a[j])
    
    pos = {v: i for i, v in enumerate(sorted_a)}
    perm = [pos[v] for v in a]
    
    # Compute parity of perm
    visited = [False] * n
    parity = 0
    for i in range(n):
        if not visited[i]:
            cycle_len = 0
            j = i
            while not visited[j]:
                visited[j] = True
                j = perm[j]
                cycle_len += 1
            # cycle of length L contributes L-1 transpositions
            parity ^= (cycle_len - 1) % 2
    
    print("YES" if parity == 0 else "NO")

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()

pipelines.final_code:
import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    from collections import Counter
    cnt = Counter(a)
    
    # Check for duplicates
    for v in cnt.values():
        if v > 1:
            print("YES")
            return
    
    # All distinct, compute permutation parity
    # sorted array is just sorted(a)
    # a[i] should go to position where sorted_a has a[i]
    sorted_a = sorted(a)
    pos = {v: i for i, v in enumerate(sorted_a)}
    
    perm = [pos[v] for v in a]
    
    # Count cycles
    visited = [False] * n
    cycles = 0
    for i in range(n):
        if not visited[i]:
            cycles += 1
            j = i
            while not visited[j]:
                visited[j] = True
                j = perm[j]
    
    # Even permutation iff (n - cycles) % 2 == 0
    if (n - cycles) % 2 == 0:
        print("YES")
    else:
        print("NO")

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()
